What Our Customers Say

★★★★★
4.5 · 387 Reviews
★★★★★
CARFAX · 4.6/5
"
MR
Maria R.
★★★★★

A1 Auto Repair is the best shop in Woodland! They diagnosed my car quickly, explained everything clearly, and didn't charge me for unnecessary work. Honest mechanics are hard to find — these guys are the real deal.

Google Review
"
JL
James L.
★★★★★

Brought my truck in for a smog check and they were fast and professional. Great staff, fair pricing, and no surprise charges. I'll be coming back for all my auto needs.

Yelp Review
"
SP
Sara P.
★★★★★

Got my windows tinted and my car detailed here — absolutely amazing results. The team was super friendly and the turnaround was quick. Highly recommend for anyone in the Woodland area!

Google Review

Our Story

"Serving Woodland families since 2017 — honest work, fair prices, every time."

Est. 2017
Welcome to A1 Auto Repair

AUTO REPAIR
DONE RIGHT.

At A1 Auto Repair & Detail Center, we work hard to be Yolo County's one-stop auto shop. We take pride in offering genuine car care and superior customer service to every person who walks through our doors — with no surprise charges and no unnecessary repairs.

Our ASE-certified technicians provide high-quality routine care and major repairs for all makes and models — foreign and domestic — using today's latest automotive technology. From oil changes to engine replacements, we handle it all.

Yolo County's one-stop auto shop — repair, detail, smog, and tinting all in one place.
Schedule a RepairCar Care Tips
01
ASE Certified

Our technicians hold ASE (Automotive Service Excellence) certification — the gold standard in auto repair.

02
Star Certified Smog

Licensed Star Certified Test and Repair Smog Station. We handle both smog tests and repairs in one visit.

03
Family Owned

Locally owned and operated in Woodland since 2017 by Ahmad Waqar. CA BAR License #287351.
